attr.title: Mina the Hollower
attr.desc: Mina the Hollower is a top-down action-adventure from Yacht Club Games, set in a richly detailed 8-bit world. Play as Mina, a resourceful engineer-hero, whipping foes and solving dungeon puzzles across the cursed island of Tenebrous Isle.
attr.inst: Requires the macOS game files from GOG (a .pkg installer) or Steam (the Mac depot). See README.md for details.
